memberdef.name: TAB_APPEND_CAST
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if( (count) > 0 ) \ (tab) = cast realloc( tab, sizeof( *(tab) ) * ( (count) + 1 ) ); \ else \ (tab) = cast malloc( sizeof( *(tab) ) ); \ if( !(tab) ) abort(); \ (tab)[count] = (p); \ (count)++; \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: TAB_FIND
memberdef.initializer: do { \ for( (idx) = 0; (idx) < (count); (idx)++ ) \ if( (tab)[(idx)] == (p) ) \ break; \ if( (idx) >= (count) ) \ (idx) = -1; \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: TAB_ERASE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if( (count) > 1 ) \ memmove( (tab) + (index), \ (tab) + (index) + 1, \ ((count) - (index) - 1 ) * sizeof( *(tab) ) );\ (count)--; \ if( (count) == 0 ) \ { \ free( tab ); \ (tab) = NULL; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: TAB_REMOVE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ int i_index; \ TAB_FIND( count, tab, p, i_index ); \ if( i_index >= 0 ) \ TAB_ERASE( count, tab, i_index ); \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: TAB_INSERT_CAST
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if( (count) > 0 ) \ (tab) = cast realloc( tab, sizeof( *(tab) ) * ( (count) + 1 ) ); \ else \ (tab) = cast malloc( sizeof( *(tab) ) ); \ if( !(tab) ) abort(); \ if( (count) - (index) > 0 ) \ memmove( (tab) + (index) + 1, \ (tab) + (index), \ ((count) - (index)) * sizeof( *(tab) ) );\ (tab)[(index)] = (p); \ (count)++; \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: BSEARCH
memberdef.initializer: do { \ int low = 0, high = count - 1; \ answer = -1; \ while( low <= high ) {\ int mid = ((unsigned int)low + (unsigned int)high) >> 1;\ zetype mid_val = entries[mid] elem;\ if( mid_val < key ) \ low = mid + 1; \ else if ( mid_val > key ) \ high = mid -1; \ else \ { \ answer = mid; break; \ }\ } \ } while(0)

detaileddescription.para:
Binary search in a sorted array. The key must be comparable by < and >
entries
array of entries
count
number of entries
elem
key to check within an entry (like .id, or ->i_id)
zetype
type of the key
key
value of the key
answer
index of answer within the array. -1 if not found

memberdef.name: DECL_ARRAY
memberdef.initializer: struct { \ int i_alloc; \ int i_size; \ type *p_elems; \ }

memberdef.name: ARRAY_INSERT
memberdef.initializer: do { \ _ARRAY_GROW1(array); \ if( (array).i_size - pos ) { \ memmove( (array).p_elems + pos + 1, (array).p_elems + pos, \ ((array).i_size-pos) * sizeof(*(array).p_elems) ); \ } \ (array).p_elems[pos] = elem; \ (array).i_size++; \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: ARRAY_REMOVE
memberdef.initializer: do { \ if( (array).i_size - (pos) - 1 ) \ { \ memmove( (array).p_elems + pos, (array).p_elems + pos + 1, \ ( (array).i_size - pos - 1 ) *sizeof(*(array).p_elems) ); \ } \ (array).i_size--; \ _ARRAY_SHRINK(array); \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: FOREACH_ARRAY
memberdef.initializer: { \ int fe_idx; \ for( fe_idx = 0 ; fe_idx < (array).i_size ; fe_idx++ ) \ { \ item = (array).p_elems[fe_idx];

memberdef.argsstring: (const vlc_dictionary_t *p_dict, const char *psz_key, void(*pf_free)(void *p_data, void *p_obj), void *p_obj)
memberdef.name: vlc_dictionary_remove_value_for_key

detaileddescription.para: This file defines functions, structures and macros for handling arrays in vlc
